name: Salsa Cubano Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Put onions, garlic, orange juice (or lime juice) and water in a blender.
2. Set blender on "liquify" setting and process until smooth.
3. Crush all dry ingredients together and add them to the blender.
4. Process for one minute more.
5. Marinate meat (chicken, beef, pork or fish) in the mixture for at least one hour. It is better to marinate meats overnight.
6. Brush meat frequently with the sauce while cooking.
Makes 2 Cups.
